_comment: RECORDED baseline (pre-projection) of the byte-exact commands each CI parallel merge-gate lane runs in .github/workflows/ci.yml. tests/unit/meta/ci-registry-parity.test.ts asserts (a) buildCiPlan()'s projected lane commands equal this fixture and (b) every command here appears verbatim as a `run:` in ci.yml — together proving the projection reproduces the lanes byte-for-byte and the workflow was not rewritten/interpolated.
